events.label: Great Conjunction
events.description: Jupiter–Saturn closest approach in ~800 years. 6.1 arcmin separation. Best since 1623.

events.label: Five Planet Alignment
events.description: Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn in sequential order. First since Dec 2004.

events.label: Five Planet Alignment
events.description: Five naked-eye planets aligned. Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn.

events.label: Christmas Star
events.description: Jupiter–Saturn conjunction. Often cited as possible "Star of Bethlehem" analogue.

events.label: Next Great Conjunction
events.description: Next Jupiter–Saturn great conjunction (~20 yr cycle).
